generated_oml:
import base from "http://www.omg.org/spec/OML/base"
import DTDFVocab from "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"

// ==================== Insights ==================== 
instance SafetyBreachInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that a safety breach (e.g., temperature out of safe range) has been detected."
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that the incubator is operating sub‑optimally (e.g., temperature deviates from set‑point)."
]

instance TemperatureForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivering the predicted temperature trajectory for the upcoming incubation period."
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that a specific safety violation (e.g., overheating) has occurred."
]

instance VisualisationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarising current system state for display in the operator dashboard."
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful calibration of the thermal models with new parameter values."
]

// ==================== Actions ==================== 
instance AdjustHeatBedPowerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that sets a new heating power level for the heat‑bed.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that sets a new speed for the air‑circulation fan.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ApplyHumanCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human operator intervenes to apply a corrective measure (e.g., pause heating).",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// ==================== Services ==================== 
instance ContinuousMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors internal and external temperature streams for safety and optimality.",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyBreachInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides SuboptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that delivers real‑time temperature predictions based on calibrated thermal models.",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureForecastInsight
]

instance OptimisationControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes and dispatches corrective set‑point actions to the heat‑bed and fan.",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatBedPowerAction,
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustFanSpeedAction
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that detects violations of safe operating limits and raises safety insights.",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides ApplyHumanCorrectiveAction
]

instance VisualisationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that visualises sensor data, model predictions and control actions for operators.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualisationInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs the calibration algorithm to update model parameters from sensor data.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

// ==================== Enablers ==================== 
instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm that updates the free parameters of the thermal models using streamed temperature data.",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring algorithm that continuously evaluates sensor data for safety breaches and sub‑optimal performance.",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousMonitoringService
]

instance PredictionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation engine that uses calibrated thermal models to forecast temperature trajectories.",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance OptimisationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimisation algorithm that generates set‑point commands for the heat‑bed and fan to achieve target temperature.",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimisationControlService
]

instance VisualisationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualisation tool that renders current and predicted system states for engineers and operators.",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualisationService
]

// ==================== Models ==================== 
instance TwoParamThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical simulation model with two free parameters, representing heat‑transfer dynamics of the incubator.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance FourParamThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical simulation model with four free parameters, capturing thermal inertia of the heat‑bed more accurately.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

// ==================== Data Transmission ==================== 
instance InternalTempDataTransmittedA : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorA
]

instance InternalTempDataTransmittedB : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorB
]

instance ExternalTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTempSensor
]

// ==================== Data Objects ==================== 
instance InternalTempDataA : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature measurements from InternalTempSensorA.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataTransmittedA,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEngine,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine
]

instance InternalTempDataB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature measurements from InternalTempSensorB.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataTransmittedB,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEngine,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature measurements from ExternalTempSensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEngine,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine
]

// ==================== Physical Components ==================== 
instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container forming the incubator chamber."
]

instance HeatBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded heat‑bed that supplies thermal energy to raise the internal temperature, modulated via set‑point commands."
]

instance AirCirculationFan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan that provides air circulation inside the incubator."
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi that hosts the plant controller and runs the Digital Twin software."
]

instance InternalTempSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "First internal temperature sensor mounted inside the incubator chamber.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataTransmittedA
]

instance InternalTempSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Second internal temperature sensor mounted inside the incubator chamber.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataTransmittedB
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor measuring ambient temperature outside the incubator.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempDataTransmitted
]

// ==================== Environment ==================== 
instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedContainer,
    HeatBedActuator,
    AirCirculationFan,
    RaspberryPiController,
    InternalTempSensorA,
    InternalTempSensorB,
    ExternalTempSensor
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is addressed by comparing the two temperature prediction models: the four‑parameter model exhibits higher fidelity, accurately capturing the thermal inertia of the heat‑bed as demonstrated by experimental validation. Validation is performed by running the models against measured temperature data from the physical incubator and assessing prediction error. Calibration algorithms are employed to update model parameters, reducing uncertainty arising from parameter estimation. Model quality assurance relies on this iterative calibration‑validation loop, but specific quantitative error metrics or uncertainty quantification methods are not described in the documents."
]
